secondary_offer.name: One-route public-source micro-audit
secondary_offer.scope: GO / HOLD / NO-GO audit for one public-source earning or value route.

referral_proposal.payout_setup: handled only after both sides agree on a safe payout path; do not send payment secrets or private financial data through this website

evidence_gate: Do not count clicks, listings, leads, or promises as income. Count only after buyer payment or another paid_or_usable_value event is actually received and verified.
privacy_boundary: No passwords, OTPs, cookies, tokens, API keys, payment card data, KYC/tax files, bank details, wallet secrets, claim IDs, private screenshots, or private account text.
